ddls:
CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "testimony" TEXT /* Detailed feedback or comments from the user */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the e-reader product being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review not helpful */,
  "reviewer_expertise" TEXT /* Reviewer's level of expertise with the product (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "reviewer_recommendation" INTEGER /* Whether the reviewer recommends the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the e-reader product */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the e-reader product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the product was released */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product category */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand name of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in ounces */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product in inches */,
  "battery_life" TEXT /* Battery life of the product in hours */,
  "display_type" TEXT /* Type of display (e.g., e-ink, LCD) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered on the platform */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being rated */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating for the product */,
  "total_reviews" INTEGER /* Total number of reviews for the product */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_ratings_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose preferences are stored */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred product category */,
  "email_notifications" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants to receive email notifications */,
  "dark_mode" INTEGER /* Whether the user prefers dark mode */,
  "recommended_products" INTEGER /* Whether the user wants to see recommended products */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommended_products" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the recommendation */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended product */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_products_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommended_products_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature entry */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product with the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_features_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES products ("item_id")
)
